headline: Baker Hughes Secures Long-Term Contract Extensions With Equinor
summary: BKR wins multi-year contract extensions with Equinor in the North Sea, expanding its role in drilling, well services and intervention solutions.

headline: Nvidia, Meta and Schlumberger rank among top companies in adopting AI, new study says

headline: Baker Hughes Announces Contract Extensions with Equinor and Petrobras
summary: Baker Hughes Company (NASDAQ:BKR) is included among the 14 Best Oil and Gas Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. Baker Hughes Company (NASDAQ:BKR) is an energy technology company that provides solutions for energy and industrial customers worldwide. headline: Elizabeth Warren Says Trump's Iran War Is Costing Americans $800 Million A Day While Oil CEOs Get Richer
summary: Elizabeth Warren criticizes Trump for causing excessive gas prices in the US, accuses oil executives of profiting from the Iran war.
